name: Edu Trail Dev Container
initializeCommand: mkdir -p .devcontainer; dotnet dev-certs https --trust --export-path=.devcontainer/local_cert.key --no-password --format PEM; dotnet dev-certs https --trust --export-path=.devcontainer/local_cert.pfx -p password
postStartCommand: dotnet restore; dotnet tool restore; dotnet dev-certs https --clean --import=.devcontainer/local_cert.pfx -p password
